description: Blue and black backpackOne haul loop, two padded and adjustable shoulder strapsTwo main zipped compartments, has a padded laptop sleeve secured with a Velcro tab closure, two slip pockets, an organiser sleeve and an earphone gateTwo zip pockets on the frontA mesh stash pocket on either side with an elasticated mouthCompression straps on both the sides with click claspPadded backDisclaimer: Please note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the image Warranty: 5 years carry-in warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
